name: macprefs-website
description: Marketing and documentation site for macprefs

scripts.dev: sh -c 'if npm query .workspace | grep -q "\"name\""; then npm run dev --workspaces --if-present; else exit 0; fi'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if npm query .workspace | grep -q "\"name\""; then npm run build --workspaces --if-present; else exit 0; fi'
scripts.check: sh -c 'if npm query .workspace | grep -q "\"name\""; then npm run check --workspaces --if-present; else exit 0; fi'
